ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Just a quick reminder that the deadline for the semester project submission is coming up on 15th October. Please make sure you have finalized your report, collected all required data, and uploaded it to the university portal before 11:59 PM.

If you need any clarification or assistance, feel free to reach out to the project coordinator, Ms. Anjali Mehta, at anjali.mehta@university.edu.

Best regards,

Sanjay
Course Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: Apply Now for Your Exclusive University Scholarship
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! You have been shortlisted for an exclusive scholarship program offered by the prestigious University Scholarship Office. To secure your spot, you must complete the verification process immediately.

Please provide the following documents and confirm your personal details by visiting our secure portal: <URL>.

Failure to act within 48 hours may result in your scholarship offer being revoked. This is a time‑sensitive matter; act now to avoid missing this opportunity.

Best regards,

Dr. Kavita R. Singh
Head, University Scholarship Office
